title: nemesia micrantha
intro: Nemesia micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the dwarf nemesia or small nemesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nemesia micrantha include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as being used as a treatment for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Nemesia micrantha can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tea, or by drying the leaves to make a herbal extract.
